task: Move the empty plastic pack of snack forward
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white table holds a blue snack pack, a white cup, a blue bowl, a white plate with food, a white plate with a brown item, and a white plate with a patterned item. The snack pack is a blue rectangular object with a white label, positioned on the table. STRATEGY - The task is to move the snack pack forward. First, reach for the snack pack to grasp it. Then, transport it to a new position on the table that is forward of its original location. Failure modes include dropping the snack pack during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 requires reaching the snack pack's body for a stable grasp. Step 2 involves grasping the snack pack's body to lift it. Step 3 is transporting the snack pack to the forward destination. Step 4 is placing the snack pack at the new forward position.
Goal: on(snack_pack, table); forward(snack_pack, original_pos)
Scene: snack_pack, table, cup, bowl, plate_food, plate_brown, plate_patterned
Step 1: reach(snack_pack)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue snack pack
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, snack_pack, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, snack_pack) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(snack_pack)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue snack pack
  contact: holding(snack_pack) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(snack_pack)
Step 3: transport(snack_pack -> forward_pos)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table forward of the snack_pack's original position
  spatial: above(snack_pack, forward_pos, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(snack_pack)
  done_when: above(snack_pack, forward_pos, 0.05)
Step 4: place(snack_pack -> forward_pos)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table forward of the snack_pack's original position
  contact: surface_contact(snack_pack, forward_pos) [completion]; released(snack_pack) [completion]
  pose: stable(snack_pack) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(snack_pack, forward_pos) AND released(snack_pack)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the blue snack pack
the body of the blue snack pack
an empty area on the table forward of the snack_pack's original position
an empty area on the table forward of the snack_pack's original position
